title: calepina irregularis
intro: Calepina irregularis, also known as rock cabbage or calepina, is a perennial plant in the mustard family that grows in mountainous regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calepina irregularis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used to treat various health issues, including arthritis, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
